form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (FrU4) over 2400m at Mt Harding, beaten 12 m by Blue Collar (3:13.20) on March 22 at $13.40. form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Blue Collar at Mt Harding over 2400m on March 22 at $3.40. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Spiritinthesky at this track over 2600m in a 4yo+ on April 4. Nicely drawn and is a leading player again.
